label: Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training

node.label: Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training
node.definition: Distributed and mixed-precision training partition data, parameters, optimizer state, or experts across devices while using reduced numeric precision to save memory and time.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training is to connect Distributed systems & networking, Numerical analysis to downstream capabilities including Checkpointing, recovery & experiment state, Large language models, Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins.
examples: substrate for Checkpointing, recovery & experiment state
substrate for Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Numerical analysis.

dependencies.rationale: Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training uses Distributed systems & networking as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training uses Numerical analysis as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training uses Automatic differentiation & backpropagation as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training changes, compresses, or combines parameters belonging to Mixture-of-experts models.
